Good morning, Boss! ☀️

Here's your Daily Farm Report for *Friday, June 26, 2026*. A busy day with good sales and important updates!

---

*🐔* *UNKNOWN FARM* *🐔*

💰 *Today's Financial Summary:*
*   *Total Sales:* ₹110,360.00 🎉
    *   ₹30,180.00 from local egg sales
    *   ₹50,000.00 received from Nanisir
    *   ₹30,180.00 from additional local egg sales
*   *Total Expenses:* ₹84,256.00
    *   *Salaries & Wages:* ₹21,740.00 (Manjith, Makaru)
    *   *Labor Costs:* ₹36,116.00 (Mestri, Licious, Egg Collection, Sweepers, Daily Wages)
    *   *Market Payments:* ₹24,500.00 (Various market vendors like Sagar, Susantha, Parameswar, etc.)
    *   *Medicine:* ₹1,000.00 (from Sagar)
    *   *Feed:* ₹400.00 (Anand brand)
    *   *Other Operational:* ₹400.00 (Maize unloading)
    *   *Fuel:* ₹100.00 (IndianOil)
*   *Net Cash Flow (Today's Events):* *₹26,104.00* (Sales - Expenses)

🥚 *Yesterday's Egg Production (Reported Today - June 25):*
*(Across all sheds, data reported today)*
*   *Total Eggs Collected:* 4,641 eggs 📊
*   *Good Eggs:* 4,592 eggs 👍
*   *Damaged Eggs:* 42 eggs 💔
*   *Big Eggs Reported:* Approximately 176 eggs (including 1 tray and 3.3 units, estimated at 30 eggs/unit)

---

*🚜* *SUNFRA FARMS* *🚜*

💰 *Financial Updates (Reported Today):*
*   *Major Sales Invoice:* ₹819,000.00 for 4,200 egg trays to Shankar Naidu. This invoice is dated June 25, so it's a significant sale from yesterday! 📈
*   *Purchase Reported:* ₹9,000.00 for a Gear Box from Indus Poultry Equipments Pvt Ltd. (Invoice dated June 24).

---

*✨ Important Updates & Notes:*
*   No mortality reported today across the farms. Great news! ✅
*   We've processed the payment for Karthik's food expenses of ₹285.00, which was incurred on June 25.
*   Keep an eye on the large invoice for Shankar Naidu; it's a substantial amount.

---

Everything is running smoothly, Boss! We're staying on top of all operations and finances. Let me know if you have any questions.

Best regards,
[Your Name/Farm Manager's Name]
Poultry Farm Manager 👨‍🌾
